---
name: Refactor
about: Improve internal design, maintainability, or structure without changing intended behavior
title: "[Refactor] "
labels: ["refactor"]
assignees: []
---

# Summary

Provide a concise description of the refactor.

## Problem Statement

What maintainability, complexity, duplication, or architectural issue is being addressed?

## Goals

What should improve as a result of this refactor?

## Non-Goals

What is not being changed?

## Current Pain Points

Describe the current issues, such as:
- duplication
- unclear boundaries
- difficult testing
- tight coupling
- brittle code paths
- inconsistent patterns

## Proposed Approach

Describe the intended direction at a high level.

## Architectural Impact

Does this affect:
- module boundaries
- interfaces
- data flow
- dependency injection
- testability
- performance

## Risks

What could break or become harder during this change?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Intended behavior preserved
- [ ] Code structure improved in the targeted area
- [ ] Tests updated as needed
- [ ] Documentation updated if architecture or conventions change
- [ ] Scope remains limited to the stated goals

## Validation Plan

How will behavior preservation and structural improvement be verified?

## Related Issues / PRs / ADRs

Link related work here.
